hero.titleLine1: Every tool you need to edit

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Simple, fast, and secure image processing in three easy steps

steps.title: Upload Your Images
steps.description: Drag and drop your files or click to browse. Support for all major formats up to 5MB per file.

steps.title: Configure & Process
steps.description: Choose your settings and process images instantly in your browser. Everything happens on your device.

steps.title: Download Results
steps.description: Download processed images individually or as a ZIP archive. Results are ready instantly.

howItWorks.badge: Processing happens instantly in your browser

privacy.title: Complete Privacy by Design
privacy.description: All processing happens locally in your browser. Your images never get uploaded to any server.

items.title: Zero Upload Required
items.description: Your images never leave your device. All processing happens locally in your browser using modern web APIs.

items.title: Offline Capable
items.description: Once loaded, most tools work without an internet connection. Process your images anywhere, anytime.

items.title: Open Source Technology
items.description: Built with modern web technologies and open standards. You can verify exactly how your images are processed.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about PixBatch

items.question: Do you upload my images to a server?
items.answer: No. PixBatch processes images locally in your browser. Your files never leave your device.

items.question: What are the upload limits?
items.answer: Up to 5MB per file and up to 10 images per batch (per upload).

items.question: Which image formats are supported?
items.answer: Most tools support JPG/JPEG, PNG, WebP, AVIF, and GIF. Supported formats can vary slightly by tool.

items.question: Can I remove EXIF/metadata before sharing?
items.answer: Yes. Use our Remove EXIF tool (or the “Strip metadata” option where available) to remove EXIF/ICC metadata before downloading.

items.question: Does PixBatch work offline and on mobile?
items.answer: Yes. After the page loads, most tools can keep working without an internet connection, and everything runs on modern mobile and desktop browsers. Processing speed depends on your device.
